productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Bronze Wedges
description: The perfect way to complement your casual and ethnic wear is to slip into these comfy slippers from carlton london. The cushioned footbed and wide straps ensures maximum comfort, while the PU outsole lends traction to every step you take. Heel: 2.5" Upper Supple leather straps on the forefoot and midfoot to hold the foot in place Ergonomically curved leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Lightweight durable PU outsole with leaf-shaped grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for absolute grip and traction Raise heel for ergonomic comfort and style Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
